review: Quality of app exclusive deals and promos has fallen off hard. They were the ONLY reason I still visited McDonalds in this new age of inflated prices. Why pay $16+ for a burger combo when you can get a much better Burger in a sit-down restaurant for just a few dollars more.

Unintended planned obsolescence experienced by all users across Canada, because each time the app frequently forces users' phones to be updated for no apparent reason, the updated version would use up more memory space until the phone user needs to erase other apps to keep this particular one running, while I sympathize with those who cannot afford new phones to keep up with updates: for each subsequent scheduled update in history, ie, all Chrome operating systems have to be within 1.5 years old

While McDonald’s is a Fast Food chain their app just run the slowest on Earth. Whenever there is a promotion they just force u to load that ad first. While it takes forever to load that ad it actually asks u to click “Maybe Later” if you aren’t even slightly interested in ordering any of their special promotions, which slows u down even more. Not to mention it almost takes like a minute to load their automated QR everytime. Average time for me to order a meal on myself usually takes less than a minute but every time I almost have to spend 5 minutes just to get that stupid app working. 10 minutes if the app decide they are not in the mood for the day.

Where to start? Opening time is abysmally long. App is laggy in general. Tons of slow unnecessary animations bloating everything up. Promotion pop up takes forever to exit out of and sometimes requires multiple clicks. Constantly signs me out for no reason. I have given up using this app, the “coupons” are rarely ever that good anyways. 

If you are trying to get users to stop trying to use the app for whatever reason (maybe to save costs or reduce coupon / points usage), you’re doing a great job. 

EMBARASSING work from developers for a company of this size.

You asked for this review. A popup came up, and froze solid for a minute. The error states that my connection is poor. It isn’t - I’m on a fiber optic line with fabulous wireless reception, trying to place an order for pickup in advance so I don’t have to sit in the drive through waiting for the app to load. This app runs like molasses under the best conditions and is a pain I deal with every time I visit your drive through. I only use it because you gate all your best savings and coupons through it. I experience no issues with any other apps.

This app SUCKS in the sense that it takes forever to load. Every single screen has its own loading time, often easily up to 15 seconds each. The pop-ups are insane…1-2 every single time, which is made even more frustrating by the fact that every pop up adds another 15 seconds of load time. If I didn’t literally open this app WELL in advance, GOOD LUCK getting it to load my stuff in time to even use the code in the drive thru, much less place an actual order.
